text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, my next part-time job's at the event hall
nearby, so... I'll see you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I hear "part-time job," I can't help
thinking back to that recent conversation...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
...So, basically, Ines's managers want to show her
how grateful they are for everything she does!
choice_data_list:
And that's why you're planning a thank-you
party?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's going to be totes emosh! Aren't you,
like, dying to lend a hand?
choice_data_list: How did you two end up helping out with this?
How did you two end up helping out with this?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
What happened again? Oh yeah, we came by to
eat some ramen and the manager was like, "Are
you guys friends with Fu?"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And then—get this! She was like, "Someday I'd
love to reward her for all her hard work."

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Facts! So then we said, "Why wait when we can do it rn?!" And we figured all her other managers would be stoked if they could thank her too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So, yeah, that's how the whole party idea came
about.
choice_data_list: Okay, what do you want me to do?
Okay, what do you want me to do?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, are you hype too, Trainer? Yus! Let's make
this the most lit party ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, as part of the party prep, I decide to
check out Ines Fujin's work ethic for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take a tiny little peek, that's all. Or
at least, that was the plan, but—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Trainer?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Team Leader
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you know this person, Ines? I found them
wandering around the part-time reception area.
Would you mind showing this newbie the ropes?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whaaat! So you are going to work here? You could've just said, you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I was scoping out Ines' workplace, I got
mistaken for a worker and brought all the way
here... But I can't exactly admit that to her.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you're stumped about anything, just come
to me! This venue's kind of special. It's not like at
other events.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, in an effort to witness her work ethic up
close, I start my shift as a member of the event
staff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The line is now moving forward! Please don't push
while you proceed!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, excuse me! This seat here is available! And
it's a good one—you'll get a clear view of the
show!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The food's been delivered, so I laid out all the
dishes!

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Whoa, you've even portioned out the
food! That's a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Comedian
text_block_list.text:
It's actually working again! I can't believe how
fast you fixed up this mic!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll use it to deliver some big laughs to
the audience! I'm expecting some killer gags! ♪

text_block_list.name: Team Leader
text_block_list.text:
I can't thank you enough! I heard you're quite the
skilled worker, but you're downright exceptional!
It'd be an honor to have you back sometime!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! I'll come back once my schedule frees
up, so save me some shifts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Working a shift with Ines Fujin gives me a firm
grasp of both her attentive nature and quickness
to act.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can definitely see why her managers are so
grateful to have her on staff.
choice_data_list: You do a great job of looking out for everyone.
You do a great job of looking out for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks. You weren't half bad yourself,
Trainer. ♪
choice_data_list: What's your secret to working so well?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, my secret... I've never really thought about
it that way. I mean, I think personality comes into
it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm guessing that's not the answer you're
looking for, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. If I had to say, I think the secret is to
consider what would make people happy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whenever I helped out my mom as a kid, she'd be super happy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And that made me happy too. I remember that
fuzzy feeling in my heart being so comforting,
y'know.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's when I realized how great it is to make
people happy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Even now, remembering that feeling helps me do
my best!
choice_data_list: That's a wonderful mindset to have.
That's a wonderful mindset to have.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Even now, remembering that feeling helps me do
my best!
choice_data_list: That's a wonderful mindset to have.
That's a wonderful mindset to have.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'd say it practically sums up my whole way
of life!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: If you didn't think that was like me, we'd have a problem!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I look at Ines Fujin, she almost appears to be
glowing against the backdrop of the setting sun.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I know, right?! I think so too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've got my mom to thank for inspiring me! And I
can't thank her enough!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
One day, I really want to repay the favor
tenfold. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We could go to a hidden hot spring deep in the
mountains together—ooh, or a five-star hotel!
Wait, an overseas trip could be nice. Hmm, so
many options!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The excitement in her voice is infectious, and I
can't help but smile as I listen.
